page_metadata.biotools__summary: R package for multiple marker meta-analysis. It can carry out meta-analysis of SKAT, SKAT-O and burden tests with individual level genotype data or gene level summary statistics.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: R package for multiple marker meta-analysis. It can carry out meta-analysis of SKAT, SKAT-O and burden tests with individual level genotype data or gene level summary statistics.
